title: Dragon’s Bane doubles attack damage to Dragon targets

card.rawText: All creatures inflict 2x Atk damage to Dragon-type creatures, or creatures with “Dragon” in their name on the field.

plan.title: Dragon’s Bane doubles attack damage to Dragon targets
plan.summary: With Dragon’s Bane active as field magic, a creature attacking a Dragon-type or Dragon-named target deals 2x attack damage.

notes: Pre-place Dragon’s Bane in an active field magic slot.
Use a player_1 primary attacker with 1 attack die and +0 modifier if available, or account for printed modifier in expected damage.
Set Dragon Fox as player_2 primary Dragon target.
Ensure not in first turn cycle.

steps: Player 1 attacks Dragon Fox while Dragon’s Bane is field-active.
Inspect damage event multiplier and defender HP loss.

expectedAssertions.label: Dragon target took doubled attack damage

manualVerification: Confirm predicate matches Dragon creature type and also names containing Dragon in a separate variant.
Confirm non-Dragon targets are not doubled.
riskNotes: Runtime support reports no route for APPLY_DAMAGE_MULTIPLIER_AURA; may not affect damage pipeline.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate unsupported field aura before marking runtime blocker.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
